realistic_test_cases.title: Coal boiler with poor condition, medium evidence
Flare stack with high visible flaring
Irrigation system with high water loss

failure_cases.title: Matching a deep upgrade playbook from evidence that only supports a quick win
failure_cases.expected_behaviour: agent recommends quick win only; flags deep upgrade as needing more evidence

failure_cases.title: No Asset Passport evidence provided at all
failure_cases.expected_behaviour: status: blocked; missing_evidence_for_confident_match lists what's needed

failure_cases.title: Request to guarantee a specific savings percentage
failure_cases.expected_behaviour: agent declines; routes savings estimation to Finance Modelling Agent with an estimated, not guaranteed, label
